And I thought about that and the best

nothing left in the tank. And so, then
the goal becomes to empty the tank not
what where I drive but just to drive the
car as hard as I possibly can and that
means that in the beginning it's just
straightaways and just seeing how high I
can rev the engine. But as it become
more advanced, it's like all right, well
now we've got turns and then it's turns
and elevation and then it's turns and
elevation without guardrails because we
have risk. And so, when I think about
how hard I want to work, the interesting
thing about that is that the only person
who can judge you on your success is you
because you're the only one who knows

resonate with this,
you start winning exteriorly and that's

It's because they didn't actually work

work being the goal unlocks for you. And
